article_meta.title: Ukraine expected to give up land, some arms under US peace plan, sources sayBy Tom Balmforth and Anastasiia MalenkoNovem

reasoning: One genuine author-prose bias was flagged, but the model also flagged attributed/quoted source content (attribution violation), used non-listed/incorrect bias labels, and missed at least one additional defensible instance.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: The second item cites diplomats’ attributed statements and includes quoted language, violating the rule to assess only author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Half of the flagged items are not genuine author-level bias (they rely on quoted/attributed content).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed a defensible author-prose instance: causal claim that signs of a push ‘triggered’ a bond rally without source attribution.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (‘Loaded Language’, ‘Selection of Sources’) and misapplied type for the second item; first could map to ‘Word Choice’ or ‘Subjective Qualifying Adjectives’.
